x4freetext: Conversion of (p,p`) double differential cross sections
due to Coulomb excitation to the photoabsorption
cross section by using the equivalent photon method.
The caption of Fig.8 is written in a misleading way.
It shows the equivalent photoabsorption cross
sections after conversion with the virtual photon
Figs.8 and 9 show the same except a different
binning in Fig.9 for comparison with other data.
